name: Youpo Noodles HI
tagline: Chinatown's hand-pulled biang biang noodle shop — thick, chewy, ripped-to-order noodles with bold Northwestern Chinese flavors.
mustOrder: cumin lamb noodles — the signature, aromatic and spicy
youpo noodles — hot oil poured over hand-pulled noodles
beef noodle soup — rich broth, tender beef
parking: Metered street parking on Maunakea St
talkStory: Started as a farmers market stand and grew into a Chinatown brick-and-mortar — that trajectory tells you the noodles are legit. Specializes in biang biang noodles from Northwestern China — thick, wide, hand-pulled noodles ripped to order. The youpo (hot oil) technique pours sizzling oil over chili flakes and noodles tableside. Flavors are bold — cumin lamb, chili oil, black vinegar. Featured in Honolulu Magazine. A completely different experience from the Cantonese noodle shops that dominate Chinatown.
